name: First American Title Agency Services
description_short: First American Title Agency Services provides title insurance, settlement, and closing services to real estate agents and attorneys across Pennsylvania, with offices in Berwyn and Pittsburgh.
description_long:
First American Title Agency Services is a Pennsylvania-based division of First American Title Company, one of the nation's largest title insurance providers. The company operates two office locations—one in Berwyn and one in Pittsburgh—and serves as a B2B resource for title agents, real estate attorneys, and closing professionals throughout the state. Their business model centers on supporting independent title agents and law firms with underwriting, compliance, and operational infrastructure rather than serving consumers directly.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of B2B title services including residential and commercial title insurance, title searches, property data production, refinance automation tools, escrow services, settlement software, and remote online notary (RON) services. They provide title agent software optimized for workflow management, data handling, and compliance with Pennsylvania-specific closing requirements. Their underwriting department includes counsel and specialists who offer guidance on policy issuance and claims handling to agent partners.

First American Title distinguishes itself through integrated technology solutions designed specifically for title agencies of varying sizes, combined with direct access to experienced underwriting counsel and sales support staff. The company emphasizes streamlined production processes, commercial transaction expertise, and educational resources (AgentNet) to help partners expand their business capabilities. Their dual office presence in major Pennsylvania markets ensures regional expertise and proximity to key service areas.

As a title agency services provider, First American Title does not lend money or originate mortgages; they facilitate real estate closings and provide title protection. Consumers encounter them indirectly through their title agent partners. The company's value proposition depends entirely on the quality and responsiveness of local agents who use their underwriting and technology platforms. Geographic coverage is limited to Pennsylvania, which may restrict options for multi-state title operations.
pros: Integrated technology platform including title software, search automation, and escrow production tools designed for multiple agency sizes
Team of licensed underwriting counsel on staff (multiple attorneys listed) providing direct guidance and compliance support
Commercial title services with specialized escrow and funding solutions alongside residential offerings
Remote Online Notary (RON) services to support digital closing workflows
Two physical office locations in high-volume Pennsylvania markets (Berwyn and Pittsburgh) with dedicated sales and underwriting staff
AgentNet educational platform providing underwriting guidance and continuing education for title agent partners
Back-office support services and agent accelerator programs to help partners scale operations
cons: B2B-only model means consumers cannot use this company directly; service quality depends entirely on the independent agent they select
Limited geographic footprint (Pennsylvania only) restricts utility for multi-state real estate investors or companies
No publicly available pricing information, performance metrics, or complaint data on the website
Relatively small marketing presence compared to national title insurers; brand recognition may be limited outside Pennsylvania
Website provides no information about average closing timelines, error rates, or service level agreements
best_for: Pennsylvania-based real estate agents and law firms seeking title agency infrastructure, underwriting support, and software tools
Title agencies operating in the Berwyn or Pittsburgh markets looking for local underwriting counsel and close proximity support
Boutique closing firms and independent attorneys needing commercial title, escrow, and settlement technology solutions
Real estate brokerages expanding closing operations and requiring back-office title production and automation support
diagnosis: First American Title Agency Services is best suited for Pennsylvania-based real estate professionals, title agents, and closing attorneys seeking underwriting infrastructure, technology integration, and compliance support rather than mortgage lending. The critical caveat is that this is a B2B vendor serving intermediaries—consumers cannot access their services directly and will only interact with them indirectly through a title agent partner, making the quality of the individual agent more important than the company itself.
services: Title search and property data production
Title and settlement software for agencies
Escrow production and Safe Escrow services
Marketing and sales support for partner agencies
